stories.title: User can send a text message and receive a streaming response from Claude API
stories.description: User can send a text message and receive a streaming response from Claude API
criteria: Verify the application loads with welcome screen
Type 'Hello, how are you?' in the input field
Press Enter or click the send button
Verify the user message appears in chat immediately

stories.title: Streaming response can be stopped mid-generation
stories.description: Streaming response can be stopped mid-generation
criteria: Type a request for a long response (e.g., 'Write a 500 word essay about AI')

stories.title: Markdown rendering in assistant messages works correctly
stories.description: Markdown rendering in assistant messages works correctly
criteria: Send message: 'Explain the differences between let, const, and var in JavaScript'
Verify response contains properly rendered headings

stories.title: Code blocks have syntax highlighting and copy functionality
stories.description: Code blocks have syntax highlighting and copy functionality
criteria: Send message: 'Write a Python function to calculate fibonacci numbers'
Wait for response with code block
Verify code block has syntax highlighting

stories.title: Input textarea auto-resizes as user types
stories.description: Input textarea auto-resizes as user types
criteria: Verify initial textarea has default single-line height
Type until reaching end of line

stories.title: Shift+Enter inserts newline, Enter submits message
stories.description: Shift+Enter inserts newline, Enter submits message
criteria: Click on input field to focus
Verify cursor moves to new line

stories.title: Character count and token estimation displays correctly
stories.description: Character count and token estimation displays correctly
criteria: Verify character count is visible near input
Verify initial count shows 0 or empty

stories.title: Image upload and display in messages
stories.description: Image upload and display in messages
criteria: Select an image file from local filesystem
Verify image thumbnail appears in input area

stories.title: Message editing functionality works
criteria: Find edit button on user message

stories.title: Message regeneration functionality works
criteria: Send message: 'Give me a random number between 1 and 10'
Wait for response and note the number
Find regenerate button on assistant message

stories.title: New conversation creation works
criteria: Verify welcome screen or existing conversations
Verify welcome screen appears for new conversation

stories.title: Conversation list displays with date grouping
stories.description: Conversation list displays with date grouping

stories.title: Conversation switching preserves state
criteria: Create conversation A and add messages
Create conversation B and add different messages
Click on conversation A in sidebar
Verify messages from conversation A are displayed

stories.title: Conversation rename via inline editing
criteria: Hover over conversation title in main area

stories.title: Conversation deletion with confirmation
criteria: Find delete option (context menu or button)

stories.title: Conversation search filters list in real-time
stories.description: Conversation search filters list in real-time
criteria: Create multiple conversations with different topics
Type in search box: 'Type something unique that exists'
Type partial match of existing conversation title

stories.title: Archive conversations
criteria: Verify conversation disappears from main list

stories.title: Project creation and management
criteria: Find project selector or 'New Project' button

stories.title: Project-specific custom instructions
criteria: Add custom instructions: 'Always respond in Spanish'

stories.title: Move conversations between projects
criteria: Create project A and project B

stories.title: Model selection with Claude Sonnet 4.5
criteria: Verify default model is Claude Sonnet 4.5

stories.title: Model capabilities display on hover
criteria: Verify context window info is displayed

stories.title: Global custom instructions are applied
criteria: Add global instruction: 'Always sign responses with -AI'

stories.title: Conversation-specific system prompt override
criteria: Find conversation settings (gear icon or menu)
Enter custom system prompt: 'You are a pirate. Speak like a pirate.'

stories.title: Theme selection: Auto mode follows system preference
stories.description: Theme selection: Auto mode follows system preference

stories.title: Code theme selection for syntax highlighting

criteria: Send message: 'Write a JavaScript hello world'

stories.title: Max tokens adjustment limits response length
stories.description: Max tokens adjustment limits response length

stories.title: Artifact detection from Claude response
criteria: Send message: 'Create a simple HTML page with a red button'

stories.title: Code artifact viewer with syntax highlighting

stories.title: Artifact editing and re-prompting
criteria: Click to send edited code back to Claude

stories.title: Full-screen artifact view
criteria: Verify artifact panel expands to full screen

criteria: Generate a code artifact (e.g., Python file)

Verify file is downloaded with correct extension

stories.title: Artifact versioning and history
criteria: Send re-prompt to generate new version
